parsed_review.summary: CP00-203 is a descriptor-only DMS "Secondary Workflow Slice" sensitive-tail pack (Risk A, 10 units, RP06.P02.M04.S16-S25) that passes read-only review. Plan binding is consistent across closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest.json, review-baseline.json, and DMS_CORE_CP203_PACK_BINDING (10 units; deliverable distribution implementation:1/failure_recovery:2/test:4/fixture:1/hermes_evidence:1/claude_review:1; micro_title "Secondary Workflow Slice":10; deviation_from_plan:false). Implementation in service.js/registry.js/validators.js defines all 7 required CP203 exports (createDmsCoreCp203SensitiveTailCaseSet/Descriptor, validateDmsCoreCp203Coverage/SensitiveTailDescriptor, Hermes/Claude/Closeout packets), re-exported via index.js. Three dedicated tests assert coverage, no-leak redaction, evidence packets, and authority boundaries; the contract projection matches generated descriptors; validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs is assertion-only with no file writes. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: synthetic IDs, zero sha256/byte_size, reserved storage pointer, Object.freeze throughout, every dispatches_*_runtime and exposes_*/leak flag false, customer-safe blocked-claim error only. Claude is read_only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, tools Read/Grep/Glob); Hermes patterns appear only as H06 control-plane evidence packets (receipt_shape descriptor_only_*_no_write), not product runtime. Review hardening is satisfied: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1448-byte valid JSON), no invalid review attempts, prompt excludes full source/diff, and no stale raw-output.json/review-receipt.json with forbidden (auth_failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced-prose/tool-call-shaped) evidence. The pack-level production_ready claim is honestly false/review_pending and not prematurely asserting enterprise trust; unrelated dirty worktree files are correctly segregated and not inferred into pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; the in_progress/PENDING states are the expected pre-receipt posture for this review step of the hardened sequence.
